category_sources: source_facts.description says Shikata ga nai encoder in Go; official README says SGN is a polymorphic binary encoder for offensive security purposes: https://github.com/EgeBalci/sgn
display_name_sources: Official README refers to SGN and repository name is sgn: https://github.com/EgeBalci/sgn
docs_sources: No dedicated docs site found; official README documents installation, usage flags, Docker usage, and library usage: https://github.com/EgeBalci/sgn#readme
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/EgeBalci/sgn; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README describes a polymorphic binary encoder for offensive security and a Go reimplementation of Shikata ga nai with CLI usage: https://github.com/EgeBalci/sgn
